leaves:
f"""\
                [loggers]
                keys=root

                [handlers]
                keys=console

                [formatters]
                keys=default

                [logger_root]
                handlers=console

                [handler_console]
                class=StreamHandler
                level={log_level}
                formatter=default
                args=(sys.stderr,)

                [formatter_default]
                format=%(message)s
